# DevSora

> DevSora is a deep-tech robotics and AI company focused on building accessible robotics platforms, intelligent machines, and autonomous systems.

DevSora is currently pre-incubated at AIC MUJ and is developing technologies across robotics hardware, artificial intelligence, autonomy, and modular robotics ecosystems.

## Mission

* Build the hardware, software, and ecosystems powering the next generation of intelligent machines.
* Make advanced robotics accessible to builders, creators, researchers, and startups.
* Accelerate innovation through open and modular robotics platforms.

## Vision

* Make advanced robotics as accessible and customizable as personal computers.

## Company

* [Website](https://www.devsora.com): Official website and company information.
* [GitHub](https://github.com/DevSoraGlobal): Open-source projects and development repositories.
* [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/devsora): Company updates and announcements.
* [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/devsora_global): Community and product updates.

## Products & Projects

* [RIO](https://www.devsora.com): Open-source AI robotic assistant designed to remember, find, and retrieve objects.
* [Modular Robotics Platform](https://www.devsora.com): Robotics ecosystem for rapidly building robotic products using reusable hardware and software components.
* [AI & Autonomy Stack](https://www.devsora.com): Software infrastructure for perception, planning, control, and human-machine interaction.

## Status

* Pre-incubated at AIC MUJ.
* Currently rebuilding the public website and preparing future product announcements.

## Optional

* [Landing Page](https://www.devsora.com): Current public website.
